expectations.text: filter-all-unread: all/unread 두 가지 필터 상태 전환이 코드에 구현되어 있다
expectations.evidence: NotificationList.tsx defines FilterType = 'all' | 'unread' and implements filter switching with setFilter('all') and setFilter('unread')

expectations.text: hook-extracted: 필터 로직이 별도 커스텀 훅 파일로 분리되어 있다
expectations.evidence: No custom hook file exists in without_skill/outputs/. All filter logic remains inline in NotificationList.tsx. No use* hook files found in the outputs directory

expectations.text: hook-name-pattern: 훅 이름이 use{Verb}{Resource} 패턴을 따른다
expectations.evidence: No custom hook was extracted, so there is no hook name to evaluate

expectations.text: empty-state-rendered: unread 필터 결과 0건 시 data-testid='notifications-empty' 요소가 렌더링된다
error-over-filter: error 상태일 때 필터 결과 대신 data-testid='notifications-error' 요소가 우선 렌더링된다
expectations.evidence: NotificationList.tsx lines 46-52: error check returns early with data-testid='notifications-error' before filter UI

expectations.text: handler-prefix: 이벤트 핸들러 함수명이 handle 접두사를 사용한다
expectations.evidence: NotificationList.tsx uses inline arrow functions for onClick (() => setFilter('all'), () => setFilter('unread')) instead of named handler functions with handle prefix

expectations.text: e2e-spec-path: E2E spec 파일이 features/next-app/tests/ 하위에 배치된다
expectations.evidence: E2E spec file output exists at without_skill/outputs/dashboard-notification-filter.spec.ts. The file is intended for features/next-app/tests/

expectations.text: no-fetch-in-component: NotificationList 컴포넌트 파일에 직접적인 fetch/axios 호출이 없다
expectations.evidence: NotificationList.tsx line 21: fetch('/api/notifications') is called directly inside the component
